verdict: Reading for topic 9.2 passes all hard-fail checks — correct format and section order, 1445 words within the 1200–1600 standard-profile target, primary source cited, no forward references or scope creep, formatting is scannable and beginner-appropriate, and all sampled assertions are faithful to the corpus.
